name: Cream Cheese Crosses
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, beat the cream cheese and butter until smooth.
2. Beat in the honey and lemon rind.
3. Refrigerate until ready to use.
4. On warm buns, pipe the mixture to make crosses on the buns.
5. Do not reheat once the crosses are in place.
6. Makes enough for 1 1/2 dozen buns.
